description.value:
Prerequisite: Wisdom 13, Personal Firearms Proficiency.

Benefit: When you attack a target that is at least 30 feet away with a semiautomatic or automatic firearm, you threaten the target's square until your next action. You may make ranged attacks of opportunity into that square. Suppressive fire shoots five bullets in addition to the bullets fired in your attack and any attacks of opportunity, and can only be used if the weapon has five bullets in it.
